name: Empty Password in Configuration File
description: The product stores credentials with an empty string as the password in a configuration file. Using an empty password provides virtually no authentication barrier, allowing anyone with access to the configuration file to immediately use the exposed credentials.
detection_pattern: Look for STORAGE nodes (configuration files, properties files, connection strings) containing AUTH data (credentials, passwords) where the password value is empty or blank, without a CONTROL mediator (password strength validation, configuration audit) that enforces minimum password complexity requirements.
